Notes: Abby Nielsen sank one of two free throws with 7.6 seconds left to give #3
Concordia-St. Paul a 78-77 win at Wayne State.  Katie LaViolette scored 21
points for CSP.  Laquisha Cook had career-high 29 points for WSC.
Jodie Boss set new WSC single game record with 10 blocked shots.
Game.Officials: Seth Hansen,  Jeff Sylliaasen,  Troy Test
